name: Stocks for Swing
clause: ( {cash} ( ( {cash} ( latest close > latest sma( latest close , 50 ) and latest close > latest sma( latest close , 200 ) ) ) and( {cash} ( 1 day ago volume >= 400000 ) ) and( {cash} ( latest close > 21 days ago close * 1.25 or latest close > 30 days ago close * 1.3 or latest close > 63 days ago close * 1.5 or latest close > 100 days ago close * 1.75 or latest close > 252 days ago close * 2 ) ) and( {cash} ( ( ( latest high - latest low ) / latest sma( latest high - latest low , 14 ) ) * 100 > 3.5 ) ) and( {cash} ( latest sma( latest high - latest low , 21 ) > latest sma( latest high - latest low , 5 ) ) ) ) )

name: Fish Pattern Buying
